element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic taught immediately via Trouble Bruin encounter
Used for vertical traversal and platform access
Introduced progressively; includes spinning fireballs, invincibility, speed boost, health restoration
Enemies must be defeated using learned head-throw and grab mechanics
Unlike traditional platformers, falling bounces player back up with damage (forgiving mechanic)
Spotlight corner indicator changes color; restorative items maintain health
Grants access to bonus stage with basketball shooting mini-game
Appear throughout narrative to provide story context (design choice against lone hero archetype)

typical_relief_triggers: Bouncing back from pit falls (forgiving mechanic)
typical_tension_triggers: Platform sequences requiring precise head-grab timing
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate to fast-paced; North American version approximately twice as difficult as Japanese version to prevent rental completion

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Power-up head locations (varies by head type effects)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces basic mechanics (head throw, hook grab) with Trouble Bruin as early opponent; forgiving pit fall recovery teaches player safety
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive introduction of 17 power-up head varieties; stage bosses/key masters increase in complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Cumulative difficulty; requires mastery of head mechanics and power-up selection
notable_spikes: North American version ~2x harder than Japanese version (Sega of America directive)
Stage boss encounters require specific tactical application of learned mechanics

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Stage structure with integrated support characters
notable_level_patterns.description: Every stage features support characters that maintain narrative continuity; stages progress toward stage boss/key master encounter
Scattered throughout stages; 17 distinct heads with varied mechanical effects (damage increase, invincibility frames, speed, healing)
Unique to Dynamite Headdy: falling into bottomless pit bounces player back with damage rather than instant death; teaches risk mitigation
Liberty Head power-up unlocks basketball shooting mini-game bonus stage; optional content pathway
